name: Netflix
overview: Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service. They hire primarily senior engineers and are known for their unique culture of freedom and responsibility.
hiringProcess: Netflix focuses on senior hires. Process includes recruiter screen, hiring manager conversation, 4-5 technical interviews focusing on system design and past experience.
eligibility: Typically 5+ years experience. Strong system design skills. Cultural alignment with Netflix's values.
preparationTips: Read the Netflix Culture Deck. Focus on system design at massive scale. Prepare deep-dive stories about past projects.
